stemHtml: If a propeller is located ahead of an aeroplane’s CG, when the aeroplane is inclined to the airstream, this creates a...

options.a: pitch-up moment, and this effect is stabilising.
options.b: pitch-down moment, and this effect is destabilising.
options.c: pitch-up moment, and this effect is destabilising.
options.d: pitch-down moment, and this effect is stabilising.
